algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived outdoor control area combustible clearance
algorithm_input.design_intent: Set combustible-material clearance around an outdoor control area while balancing site compactness and hazard separation.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: public park material selection and site infiltration

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: public park material selection and site infiltration

query_preferences.meaning: balance compact site use and combustible clearance

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
